locator.quote: = 30 pairs/race — at the CAP, not above it.

text: E6 NO BITE was an artifact: the cap of 30 pairs/race equalled the natural rate (~178 bets ÷ 3 races ÷ 2 legs = 30 pairs/race — at the cap, not above it), so the gate never bound.

locator.quote: Conclusion: this probe tells us nothing about whether forcing

text: Conclusion: a non-binding cap tells us nothing about whether forcing selectivity via a scarcity gate works — a real test needs a binding cap (e.g. 5).

locator.quote: strength — never refused enough opens to change behaviour.

text: R4 (depth floor £10) was IDENTICAL to E3 alone agent-by-agent — inert at that strength, never refusing enough opens to change behaviour.
